bookingForm.title: Book Your Transfer
bookingForm.description: Fill in the details and get an instant quote for your trip.

cta.title: Ready to Travel with Peace of Mind?
cta.description: Secure your transport now and start your trip in the best way possible. Punctuality and professionalism guaranteed.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: We have a wide range of modern and comfortable vehicles to ensure your satisfaction.

vehicle.sedan_desc: Ideal for couples or solo travelers with comfort and efficiency.
vehicle.executive_desc: Travel in style and luxury. Perfect for business trips.
vehicle.van_desc: Plenty of space for families or small groups with more luggage.

hero.title: Your Transfer, Our Priority
hero.subtitle: Arrive at your destination with comfort, safety, and punctuality. From the airport to the hotel, we handle everything.

howItWorks.title: How It Works?
howItWorks.subtitle: Booking your transfer is quick and easy. Follow these 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1_desc: Enter your origin, destination, and date. We'll show you the best options.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Choose the vehicle that best suits your needs and confirm the booking.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Your driver will be waiting for you at the meeting point. Relax and enjoy the ride.
